Project Setup: Personal Portfolio Website

Stack: React + Vite + Framer Motion with Manrope and Sora Google Fonts

Completed Steps:
- Initialized Vite project with React
- Built fully responsive layout (mobile 375px, tablet 768px, desktop 1280px)
- Implemented sticky navigation with mobile hamburger menu
- Created all 5 required portfolio sections: Hero, About, Skills, Projects, Contact, Footer
- Added parallax decorative elements (blobs and rings with scroll-driven transforms)
- Integrated on-scroll reveal animations using Framer Motion with staggered effects
- Applied CSS Grid and flexbox for semantic responsive layout
- Implemented Google Fonts (Manrope + Sora) for typography
- Added prefers-reduced-motion media query for accessibility
- Set proper SEO metadata in document head
- Ensured no horizontal scrollbars at any breakpoint

Git Repository: Initialized with initial commit

Next Steps:
1. Replace placeholder project links with actual GitHub repositories
2. Replace placeholder email with real contact address
3. Update social media links (GitHub, LinkedIn)
4. Deploy to Vercel or Netlify
5. Run Lighthouse audit for Performance, Accessibility, Best Practices, and SEO scores
6. Verify all animations are smooth and intentional
